findings.description: The page heading '表計算ソフトの複写（絶対参照）' is not captured as a section entity. Low severity as it is a subsection label rather than a key term.

Figure::p439::2 ('絶対参照の指定方法') represents the spreadsheet diagram correctly, but the diagram contains specific formula values (E2/$I$1 → E3/$I$1) and cell data (太郎/花子 score tables) that are not described in the caption. The caption title alone is sufficient for a figure entity but the formula detail is exam-relevant.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p439::3 caption jp is '試験にはコレが出る！' as required. Both term entities (絶対参照, 複写) have accurate jp/zh/en triples matching the image text. The spreadsheet figure and exam callout figure are both present. Exam callout bullet points about 複写, $記号, and 絶対参照 are accurately conveyed by the figure entity. Release is accurate with only minor omissions.
